services.title: Panel Upgrades & Fuse Boxes
services.description: Old electrical panels causing problems? We assess, quote fairly, and upgrade your system to handle modern demands safely.

services.title: New Lighting Installation
services.description: Overhead fixtures, recessed lights, garage lighting — we install new fixtures that brighten your space properly.

services.title: Outlets & Switch Replacement
services.description: Replace old receptacles and switches throughout your home. Clean work that meets code and looks professional.

services.title: New Construction Electrical
services.description: Complete electrical systems for new builds and major renovations. Reliable service that keeps projects on track.

services.title: Rental Property Maintenance
services.description: Ongoing electrical maintenance for rental properties. Responsive service to keep your investments running smooth.

about.heading: Mike & Michael — Pensacola's electrical duo
about.body: We're the two-man team handling electrical work across Pensacola. From emergency panel fixes to full rewiring jobs, we show up on time, work within your budget, and deliver quality results. Whether it's new construction or fixing what's broken, we've built our reputation on honest work and fair pricing.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: What Pensacola says about our work

reviews.name: David C.
reviews.text: Professional and punctual. Got everything done to an excellent standard. Thanks for coming out.

reviews.name: Gina T.
reviews.text: Mike assessed our fuse box problem, quoted fairly, and came back the next day to complete the work.

reviews.name: Logan C.
reviews.text: Very professional and reliable service over the years. Responsive, trustworthy, excellent work on new construction.

reviews.name: Eric M.
reviews.text: Wonderful people with great work ethic. They upgraded my panels perfectly.

cta.heading: Ready to get your electrical work handled right?
cta.body: Call Mike & Michael's for honest electrical work in Pensacola. Fair quotes, quality results, and we show up when we say we will.
